aboutUs.founderTitle:
The Founder of
Ibink Real Estate
aboutUs.founderText: My name is David J. Ibink, founder of Ibink Real Estate. Since 1930, the Ibink family has upheld a legacy of excellence in the luxury industry, rooted in the world of fine jewellery and watches. Today, I carry this heritage into luxury real estate — guiding you in buying, selling, and managing your property. It is my honour to serve you.

masterClass.label: Free masterclass
masterClass.heading:
Thinking about buying a 
property in Spain but 
not sure where to start?
masterClass.description: We know that the process can feel overwhelming, especially with different regulations, language barriers, and knowing who to trust. To make it easier, we have created a free Masterclass that explains everything clearly, guiding you through each step so you can move forward with confidence.

salePage.title: Sell your Property in the Costa del Sol, Spain
salePage.subTitle: Strategic guidance for property owners who want to sell well, not just sell fast.

saleProperty.title: Selling property in Spain requires more than listing a home
saleProperty.text1: Selling property in Spain often starts with optimism. Strong demand, international buyers and rising prices create confidence, especially in regions like the Costa del Sol.
saleProperty.text2: What many sellers underestimate is that a successful sale is not defined by exposure alone. Pricing strategy, buyer quality, legal readiness and negotiation dynamics determine whether a sale proceeds smoothly or becomes prolonged, uncertain or compromised.
saleProperty.text3: The Spanish property market operates differently from what many sellers are used to. Multiple agents, unclear representation and inconsistent buyer qualification can create noise rather than results. This is where many sales underperform — not because the property lacks value, but because the process lacks structure.

whySale.title: Why selling property in Spain can be challenging
